title: Installing Apps
drDigitalIntro: Install an app from the app store by clicking Install, or from a developer's website by downloading and running the installer. Some apps need to be dragged into your Applications folder. Once installed, your computer has a new program you can use. You'll see it in Launchpad and Spotlight search. An app stays on your computer until you delete it.

playgroundTask.question: After installing an app from the app store, where can you find it?

options.text: In the Applications folder and Launchpad
It appears on your Desktop automatically

drDigitalSuccess: Installed apps live in the Applications folder — and Launchpad shows them all in a grid for easy access.
drDigitalHint: After installing, look in Launchpad (the rocket icon in the taskbar) or the Applications folder in the file manager.
